name: Men of Valour
bio: A brotherhood of men committed to accountability, prayer, and growing in godly character. We meet weekly over breakfast for the Word and open conversation.

name: Women of Grace
bio: A warm space for women to study Scripture, share life, and support one another through every season. All women are welcome.

name: Youth Connect
bio: Built for teenagers aged 13–19. We do life together through worship, real talk, and community service.

name: Family Life Circle
bio: For married couples and parents navigating faith and family through a Biblical lens.
